news.t: Motley Fool Asset Management To Launch Series of New ETFs to Complete Core Portfolio Allocations
Motley Fool Asset Management's Motley Fool 100 Index ETF (TMFC) surpasses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management

holdings.infoBox: TMFC is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.47%, Alphabet at 8.66%, Apple at 8.17%, Microsoft at 5.46%, and Amazon.com at 4.83%.

overview.description: The Motley Fool 100 Index ETF (TMFC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Motley Fool 100 index. The fund tracks an index of 100 of the largest US companies identified by any of the Motley Fool publications, including the top companies in the Motley Fool IQ Database. TMFC was launched on Jan 29, 2018 and is issued by The Motley Fool.

data.title: Motley Fool Asset Management To Launch Series of New ETFs to Complete Core Portfolio Allocations
